arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo's classy response about Celtic midfield competition and Arne Engels' quality
arts.sum: Paulo Bernardo’s midfield competition with Arne Engels and Reo Hatate Bernardo labelled Engels as a ‘great player’ and insisted that he doesn’t need motivation from the player and ‘we can only get better with each other’, as he told The Celtic Way .

arts.ttl: Alan Pardew nails it with a realistic view about 'outstanding' Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: But Pardew also delivered a healthy dose of realism in terms of the financial gulf between Celtic and the rest of the top European clubs. And when Pardew was informed about Celtic’s financial gap compared to Rangers, the former West Ham boss said that the cash being generated in this season’s competition is only going to benefit the bigger teams in the competition still.

arts.ttl: Derek Rae uses two German words to tell Celtic about Borussia Dortmund's 'deficiencies'
arts.sum: But now, Rae has said that Dortmund’s ‘brittle’ defence could offer Celtic hope of taking something from Germany back to Glasgow tonight. The build-up to Celtic’s big Champions League game against Borussia Dortmund continues as the clock ticks ever closer to kick-off in the Westenfallonstadion tonight.

arts.ttl: Andres Iniesta's glowing Celtic tribute as Spanish footballing icon announces plan to retire
arts.sum: One of the game's most celebrated players has announced that he will hang up his boots for good next week at the age of 40

arts.ttl: Aiden McGeady leaves Ayr United as former Celtic and Hibs star rips up deal with Scott Brown's team
arts.sum: McGeady has ripped up his deal having not played under his former teammate Brown this season

arts.ttl: How confident Brendan Rodgers is really feeling ahead of Celtic vs Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Continuing, Rodgers said: “For us, it’s looking to bring our game to the next level. Nevertheless, the trip to Germany is the start of a tough Celtic Champions League fixture run, with clashes against Atalanta and RB Leipzig on the other side of the clash in Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Darren O'Dea believes Brendan Rodgers has made a 'pivotal' summer signing for Celtic
arts.sum: The permanent addition of Adam Idah this summer was a reward for the Republic of Ireland international’s great work whilst on loan at Celtic last season. Idah has made seven appearances for Celtic and has already scored four goals so far this season.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' faith in Celtic ace with 'real quality' is absolutely crucial to get a result vs Dortmund
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has vowed that Celtic will take a bold approach against Borussia Dortmund as they look to impose themselves against last season’s Champions League finalists. With Schmeichel receiving praise from Peter Grant after Celtic equalled a 118-year clean sheet record against Heart of Midlothian, the Denmark international watched on as the Hoops bulldozed St Johnstone 6-0 to become the first side since to win six consecutive games in the Scottish top-flight without conceding since 1906/07.

arts.ttl: What Steve Bull told his manager at Wolves after he found out Celtic wanted to sign him
arts.sum: The powerful striker was asked if he knew of any clubs who wanted to sign him during his career and Bull listed four clubs, including Celtic, as ones that were interested in securing his services. Famous for his exploits at Watford, at the height of his career, Steve Bull was an England international who represented his country at the Italia 90 World Cup.

arts.ttl: Celtic’s Nicolas Kühn: “It was never about fame or money.”
arts.sum: Speaking to kicker ahead of Celtic’s Champions League game against Borussia Dortmund at the Westfalenstadion on Tuesday night, Nicolas Kühn (24) discussed his career to date after representing RB Leipzig…
